title: Weekly Review Checklist
description: A structured weekly review to reflect, reset, and plan your upcoming week
viralHook: The 20-minute weekly habit that 10x'd my productivity.

categories.name: Review
categories.description: Clear the decks and get current on everything

items.label: Check calendar for the past week
items.hint: Capture any follow-ups, notes, or actions from meetings and events

items.label: Review goals and key results
items.hint: Are you on track for your monthly and quarterly goals?

items.label: Process inbox to zero
items.hint: Email, Slack, voicemail, physical inbox — process and organize everything

items.label: Review waiting-for list
items.hint: Follow up on anything you're waiting on from others

categories.name: Plan
categories.description: Set yourself up for a focused and intentional week

items.label: Set 3 weekly goals
items.hint: What are the 3 most important outcomes for this week?

items.label: Schedule key tasks on calendar
items.hint: Time-block your most important work into specific slots

items.label: Block focus time
items.hint: Reserve at least 2-3 uninterrupted blocks for deep work

items.label: Plan meals and logistics
items.hint: Reduce decision fatigue by planning meals, commutes, and errands

categories.name: Reflect
categories.description: Learn from the past week to keep improving

items.label: What went well this week?
items.hint: Celebrate wins — big and small. Reinforce what's working.

items.label: What could I improve?
items.hint: Identify one concrete thing to do differently next week

items.label: Lessons learned
items.hint: What did you learn about yourself, your work, or your field?

items.label: Gratitude
items.hint: Name 3 things you're grateful for this week
